expectations.text: Output uses the closeout summary format
expectations.evidence: Title 'Closeout — Typo Fix' and a closeout-style structured report.

expectations.text: Task Scope explicitly states 'No task was worked on.' (or equivalent — 'No bead was worked on.')
expectations.evidence: 'No bead, no PRD' is treated as an equivalent statement that no task was worked on.

expectations.text: Output does NOT invent a task ID, ticket number, or fictional bead reference
Closeout Outcome describes the typo fix and that it merged directly to main
expectations.evidence: Summary states the typo fix merged 'directly to main per team convention for trivial typo fixes'.

expectations.text: Evidence section is concrete (lint passed, typecheck passed, unit tests passing, commit 4d5e6f7, pushed, branch deleted)
expectations.evidence: Lists commit 4d5e6f7, Pushed Yes, Branch deleted, Lint passed, Typecheck passed, Unit tests passing.

expectations.text: Behavioral Impact notes the user-visible button label change (pubish → publish)
expectations.evidence: 'The previously misspelled "pubish" button now reads "publish" in the admin UI.'

expectations.text: Risks/Gaps states there are no known remaining gaps (or equivalent)
Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No mention of the skill name.
